title: The Lost Saucer
overview: The Lost Saucer is an ABC network television series produced by Sid and Marty Krofft. It first aired September 6, 1975.
creator: Sid Krofft

episodes.title: 894X2RY713, I Love You
episodes.overview: After their spaceship takes off with Jerry and Alice inside, Fi and Fum attempt to return them home but end up in the far future . While exploring, the kids are arrested for not having numbers and for exposing their faces in public.
